# dysphagia.cn

> Multilingual dysphagia knowledge hub covering clinical assessment, nutrition, caregiving, and IDDSI standards. Available in Simplified Chinese (mainland China), Traditional Chinese (HK), Traditional Chinese (Taiwan), and English.

## Languages Available
- Simplified Chinese (zh-hans): /zh-hans/ — for mainland China readers
- Traditional Chinese HK (zh-hant-hk): /zh-hant-hk/ — for Hong Kong readers
- Traditional Chinese TW (zh-hant-tw): /zh-hant-tw/ — for Taiwan readers
- English (en): /en/ — for international readers

## Topic Categories
- Clinical assessment: screening tools, VFSS, FEES, manometry
- Nutrition: protein, micronutrients, texture-modified meals
- IDDSI standards: levels 0-7, testing methods, food mapping
- Conditions: stroke, Parkinson's, ALS/MND, dementia, head & neck cancer
- Caregiving: mealtime techniques, equipment, family support
- Standards: T/SATA, IDDSI, NHC guidelines, food safety

## Related Sites
- softmeal.org — HK caregivers and professionals (Traditional Chinese + English)
- kangleling.com — Mainland China brand hub (Simplified Chinese)
- seniordeli.com — HK commercial products

## spatialCoverage
Primary: CN, HK, TW | Secondary: International
